description: Pure SVG chart component supporting Bar, Line, Pie, Donut, and HorizontalBar chart types with optional legend, grid, value labels, animation, and click events on segments.

examples.title: Basic bar chart
examples.code:
<TmChart Type="ChartType.Bar"
         Data="@(new ChartData { Labels = new[] { "Jan", "Feb", "Mar" }, Datasets = new[] { new ChartDataset { Label = "Sales", Values = new[] { 100.0, 200.0, 150.0 }, Color = "#3b82f6" } } })"
         Height="300px"
         ShowLegend="true"
         ShowGrid="true" />
